signals.headline: RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed on XRPL and Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed on XRPL and Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The official full-scale rollout of Ripple USD (RLUSD) across the XRP Ledger and Ethereum has been confirmed as of April 18, 2026, driving massive capital influx, record-breaking XRPL transaction volume, and heightened institutional adoption amid resolved SEC litigation and advancing XRP ETF approvals.[1]

signals.headline: Elon Musk Tweet Count Market Hits 100% on 220-239 for April 14-21, 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**

signals.headline: Polymarket Analytics Tools Expose Whale Strategies and Smart Money | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Polymarket Analytics Tools Expose Whale Strategies and Smart Money | YES | MED confidence**  
Traders on X are buzzing about analytics tools providing "x-ray vision" into top Polymarket performers, revealing how serious players win via data on past trades—users call it essential for spotting mispriced markets before moves[5]. No specific whale bets named, but tools track high-volume "smart money"
